principle: 以原书为证据的知识编译系统；模型不得直接改写原文。

quality_gates.rule: Every extracted item must have source_chunk.
Every extracted item must have confidence.
AI notes must be marked ai_note=true and separated from original-book claims.
Markdown tables are not valid extraction output.
No generated concept page can be published while audit has ERROR.

model_roles.extractor: Read one work-order and output JSON only.
model_roles.compiler: Compile concept pages from reviewed evidence only.
model_roles.auditor: Judge claims against cited chunks only.
model_roles.publisher: Move reviewed pages into wiki; no rewriting.
